apps.name: Goose
apps.subtitle: WHOOP biometric tracker
apps.localizedDescription: iOS app that reads biometric data from WHOOP devices via BLE and persists it to a self-hosted FastAPI+TimescaleDB server.

versions.localizedDescription:
- Resting HR floor: 30 bpm minimum (closes #130)
- Battery fix: R22 battery level for Gen5; Gen4 0xFF guard (closes #149)
- HealthKit import persistence to SQLite (closes #150)
- Debug 3-tab split, Logs & Export rename, Breathe haptics, live strain
- Schema v21 indexes, lazy init, BLE auth retry
- Fork + upstream PR integration (units, localisation, BLE recovery, sync donut)
